content.en:
Ye Tian was too lazy to fight this fifth-stage Golden Flame Beast, and with a wave of his hand, the Xuanqi Armor appeared.

"Stop it!"

Ye Tian ordered.

The Xuanqi armor came to the side of the golden flame beast in an instant, and the domain opened to suppress the golden flame beast, and with a grasp of both hands, he directly grabbed the body of the golden flame beast to cracks.

The golden flame beast wanted to resist, but was slapped away by the Xuanqi armor with one hand.

Ye Tian didn't care about this Golden Flame Beast anymore and continued to search for the Infinite Realm Flame Fruit.

Finally, after a while, he found an Immeasurable Flame Fruit Tree and picked the few Infinite Flame Fruits on it.

"It's time to leave!"

Ye Tian asked Xuanqi Jiashi to come back.

As for the fifth-stage Golden Flame Beast, it was already dying.

......

Beyond the Jinyan River.

Ye Tian walked out of the endless flames.

Seeing that Ye Tian came out safe and sound, the Bloody Great Ancestor hurriedly stepped forward and asked, "Endless Great Ancestor, have you succeeded?"

"It worked!"

Ye Tian took out the Infinite Realm Flame Fruit.

"Great!"

The Blood Ancestor was very excited.

With this Infinite Realm Flame Fruit, he can officially join the Universal Alliance.

"Let's go, let's go back!"

Ye Tian and the Raccoon Blood Ancestor returned to the Vajra River Realm and handed over the Infinite Realm Flame Fruit.

Soon, the results came in.

"Congratulations, you have successfully completed the mission and can join the Universal Alliance!"

A fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform of the Universal Alliance appeared, congratulating.

Subsequently, the Huanyu Alliance entered the immeasurable will information of Ye Tian and the Blood Ancestor, and gave them a login.

This login can log in to the dedicated space-time network within the Universal Alliance, so as to communicate with each other.

Ye Tian and the Blood Ancestor took the login device, and then left.

......

Genki Territory.

Ye Tian and the Blood Ancestor returned, and they separated.

Ye Tian returned to the Ruins Stone Tower, and then used the login device to log in to the internal private space-time network of the Huanyu Alliance.

"This login device is very complicated, it should be refined by Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It stands to reason that the Universal Alliance does not have a Heavenly Ancestor, but in fact, it is because once a member becomes a Heavenly Ancestor, he must leave the Universal Alliance.

Otherwise, if the Heavenly Ancestor remained in the Universal Alliance, the original intention of the Universal Alliance would change, and it would slowly become the same as other forces.

The original intention of the Huanyu Alliance was to help each other, so as to impact the Heavenly Ancestor Realm, and each other was for trading, not for anything else.

Therefore, for a long time, there are probably a lot of Heavenly Ancestors who have gone out of the Universal Alliance.

It is not surprising that some Heavenly Ancestors have refined this kind of lander for the Universal Alliance.

Ye Tian didn't think too much about it, he quickly entered the space-time network of the Universal Alliance.

Airplanes!

A lot of information about the space-time network of the Universal Alliance was presented in front of his immeasurable will, and there was a lot of very important information among them.

The information here is very complete, and if you want to find some kind of material, you can find specific information from the internal intelligence network of the Universal Alliance.

For example, he casually searched for the Origin Golden Crystal and found a lot of information.

Moreover, there are several members of the Universal Alliance who openly sell Origin Gold Crystals, but the number is relatively small, only a few.

"Before, I didn't have any channels to buy the Origin Golden Crystal, so I retreated to find the ruin gold, and as a result, I easily found information about the Origin Golden Crystal here!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh that after joining the Universal Alliance, there were too many benefits.

"When I want to cultivate the immeasurable magic technique of the Ten Armed Golden Body in the future, the materials I need may be able to use the Huanyu Alliance!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But now he didn't need to cultivate the ten-armed golden body, so he didn't investigate the information of those materials.

Subsequently, he found some resources that were most suitable for refining the whole body in the fourth stage.

Although he still has the Infinite Blood Stone, the effect of the Infinite Blood Stone is becoming more and more ordinary, so he wants to change it to a better resource.

Soon, he found a resource that was extremely suitable for the fourth stage of cultivation, and there were quite a few of them.

"God Sands!"

This kind of resource is very suitable for the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms to be used to refine the whole body, and the effect is many times better than the immeasurable blood gold stone.

However, the Divine Sands were only born in a few realms, so the Xuanqi Realm did not have such resources.

It can be said that the resources of the Divine Sands are completely controlled by a small number of forces, and ordinary Great Ancestors can't get them at all.

However, with the help of the Universal Alliance, Ye Tian could naturally trade to the Divine Sands.

Soon, Ye Tian came in touch with a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform with many Divine Sands in his hands.

The other party also agreed to Ye Tian's transaction request, and the two parties agreed to meet in the space-time network of the Huanyu Alliance.

Whew!!

Ye Tian and the other party directly appeared in an hour space in the space-time network, and met in the form of projection.

"Endless Ancestor!"

"Jin Heng Ancestor!"

After Ye Tian and Jin Hengzu introduced each other, they began to talk about the topic.

"Endless Great Ancestor, if you want to trade the Divine Sands in my hand, what can you come up with? Although we are both members of the Universal Alliance, trading is free, so if you don't give me what I need, I won't agree to the transaction. Jin Hengzu said.

"Xujin, do you want it?"

Ye Tian asked.

Jin Heng Ancestor shook his head, "Ruin gold is indeed very precious, but I don't need it, it's useless to me!"

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, and he decided to take out the Tongtian True Gold.

Tongtian True Gold was an incomparably precious treasure for any fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and they would always be lacking.

Even within the Huanyu League, there are countless Great Ancestors who are eager for a piece of Tongtian True Gold, and no Great Ancestor is selling Tongtian True Gold.

There may have been great ancestors who sold it, but as soon as the news of the sale came out, it was bought in an instant.

"I can exchange a piece of innocent gold for it!"

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

Jin Hengzu agreed without hesitation.

Seeing this, Ye Tian was not surprised at all.

Immediately, the two sides began to discuss the issue of price, such as how much Shenjin Jin can be exchanged for a piece of Tongtian real gold?

After a long discussion, the two sides reached a deal and cooperation.

In the end, Ye Tian exchanged a piece of Tongtian real gold for more than 600,000 grains of divine golden sand in the hands of Jin Heng ancestor.

This deal is undoubtedly too good a deal!

In the following days, Ye Tian successively traded a lot of Divine Sands with several other Great Ancestors, and there was no need to worry about Divine Jinsha in a short period of time.

The items traded by the two sides are designated to be traded in the King Kong River Realm, so that there will be no black eating black, if there is a great ancestor who dares to eat black and black, it will be exposed in the King Kong River Realm, and the consequences will be very serious, and they may even be hunted down and killed.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to successfully complete the transaction with these fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms one by one, and got all those Divine Sands in his hands.
